# llms.txt
Site: Sanatan Gyan Sagar
Base URL: https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com
Primary language: Hindi, Sanskrit, English
Purpose: Spiritual and educational reference content only.

Key sections:
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/bhajans.html
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/bhagavad-gita.html
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/shlokas.html
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/prayers.html
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/upanishads.html
- https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/wisdom.html

Policy notes:
- No medical, legal, or financial guarantees.
- Content is devotional and educational.
- Refer to https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/disclaimer.html and https://bhajan.ournakshatra.com/privacy-policy.html
